sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50593" key="i)omigh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰομῐγής</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, </foreign>(<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰός</foreign> B) <sense id="n50593.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tainted with poison</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θηλή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
